BandwidthPackageInquiry.bandwidthInMbps: Public network bandwidth in Mbps. For EIPs billed by bandwidth, must be an integer between 1 and 200 (representing the bandwidth cap).
BandwidthPackageInquiry.type: Type of bandwidth package: BandwidthPackage (standard bandwidth package) or AccelerationPackage (cross-border acceleration package). AccelerationPackage is only supported in Hong Kong region. Default is BandwidthPackage.
